task_completion.description: Agent inputs the target location into the search interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar in the sidebar contains 'Mount Everest' or the coordinates '27.9881, 86.9250'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the Options/Preferences menu to enable Anaglyph mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Options' (Windows) or 'Preferences' (Mac) window is visible, with the '3D View' tab selected or 'Anaglyph' settings being modified.

task_completion.description: The viewport is centered on Mount Everest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view shows a high mountain peak. Text labels indicate 'Mount Everest' or the status bar shows coordinates near 27.98 N, 86.92 E.

task_completion.description: The camera angle is tilted to display the terrain profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view is not a flat top-down map; the horizon is visible or the mountain is shown in perspective with vertical relief.

task_completion.description: The scene is rendered with the anaglyph 3D effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terrain image exhibits distinct red and cyan (or blue) color separation/ghosting characteristic of stereoscopic anaglyph 3D.

integrity.description: The agent is using the Google Earth Pro desktop client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Google Earth Pro (sidebar, top toolbar, navigation compass/controls), not Google Maps in a web browser.

integrity.description: The anaglyph image is rendered by the software, not a static image search result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The view is within the interactive 3D viewport of the application, not a static image displayed in a web browser or image viewer.

integrity.description: Settings were modified using the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Options/Preferences dialog being interacted with, rather than the effect appearing instantly via terminal command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Mount Everest. Coordinates: Latitude 27.9881, Longitude 86.9250.
